Runed Bone Fork  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 29
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV FIRE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 4.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Oct 28 2002 at 2:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781503741
142 posts
it is a great item i am wanting one my main prob is my race is not liked in guk being i am a lightie and it is a pvp server umm and on top of that it is often easier and alot less stressful because it is rare drop to find a good drop spot i will not give any sugestions but i am sure you know em and take a few hours at a time and bring in up to 300 on one run of loot by the time you got 1k or whatever you will be able to go to bazaar hunt down cheapest one buy it and you are rewarded

its a game dont blow a blood vessel from items not dropping its stupid if it is not nodrop find an alternative if it is good itll be found in bazaar if not there various zones i am sure just dont go nuts cos you killed 40000 gaz squires if you get exp what else do you need if you want the rare drop go find a sweet spot camp greenies and rake in the plat

▲ Page top
PLS Explain
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2002 at 5:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777485731
2 posts
Ok now there seems to be a huge amount of hype about this weapon and I really cant seem to figure it out. All it is is a piercing weapon with a REALLY crappy ratio. It has no proc and only a few decent Saves. Are these saves actually worth over 800pp? Somebody pls explain what is good about this weapon
▲ Page top
All about the PvP...
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2002 at 6:38 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249549001
3 posts
This item is not actually used as a weapon, however it is a great resist item. On a PvP server resists are of the utmost importance. 10mr and 10cr will lessen the chance of ice comet landing by 3% and will lessen the damage by 3% or so. If you're at a raid in which the mob casts an ae fear or an ae firebomb etc etc, resists will come in handy.

Retsuo, 46th Season Ranger of Tunare
Celestial Empire
Rallos Zek

Edited, Sat Jun 22 07:30:17 2002
▲ Page top
RE: PLS Explain
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2002 at 12:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1626049033209
51 posts
It fits in your ranged slot, you don't use it to fight with, just put in your ranged and gain the resist boosts. But its an insane drop now, I spent about 19 hours there till I got it. He had 9 Ph's in a row at one point, and he dropped it maybe one out of 15 times and is an 18 minute spawn.
▲ Page top

# Apr 01 2002 at 10:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758106980
222 posts
I've killed this boy about a dozen times and have only gotten those darned undead collars. RE: Does it still drop?
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 3:17 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770529902
Scholar
24 posts
UPDATE: I finally got my Runed Bone fork on the 11th try, and 17 hours worth of killing greens.

But when I took my lvl 20 cleric with me, my friend and I spent 1 hour there, the squire popped twice in a row, both times dropped the runed bone fork! There are certain spawns that seem to drop the rare drops a bit mroe often if you have a char thats similar in level to the mob. This has also happened to me getting xegloz's fang. 3 level 60s camped that spawn for 8 hours, without a single fang dropping, the moment we got some upper 30s char in there killing, it started dropping very frequently.

Maybe I am just imagining it after camping the squirt for 17 hours getting it, and then my cleric gets one but couldn't even use it. LoL.
▲ Page top
15 mins

# Jan 13 2002 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent

22 posts
lv 30 sk got this with np casted invs on my self and just sat there ....15 mins went by and it spawned with it on..... u can see it on him when he spawn with him.....just becarefull if he runs he runs into a room with shamans that don't attack you if ur high enough but they will heal him....which is pain in the @$$ so just root or dark him :)

Im getting this for My Bard. heeeeelll yah its worth it brainplay (you noob) Resists are Important for Everything If Some one Sold it to me for 800pp I would Take it.. Although right now Im poor Spent 2k on My bard have 300pp in bank lol.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 07 2001 at 3:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 850+pp?! I dont think so! The only thing this piercer has going for it is the stats. 5/29 outright sucks! Bloodstained fang is 9/32 and it isn't even this expensive. Sounds more like some nOOb bought it real expensive and posted the price or someone intentionally boosted the price posted here for their own benifit. You can't even offhand it, its only good for range and primary. Sorry, it better have alot more than this if I'm going to be paying that much for it.
RE: this isn't worth it
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2002 at 11:57 AM Rating: Decent
Ardnahoy
Scholar
340 posts
You must be kidding... This thing gives you +10 resists to magic, fire and cold... AND it fits nicely in your range slot.

If you have EVER been to any high level raid, you would know that resists are more important than anything else. When that high level dragon is chain-casting an AoE fire spell that does 400 damage, even though you are so far away your arrows can't reach it, then you will realize just how useless AC or damage/delay is when the 400hp hit can be reduced to about 80 with resist gear on.

When I fight caster mobs, I put on all my resist gear. No caster is going to hurt me with their fists (if they even have fists), so AC is useless. I need a way to turn that 250hp frost slam into a 38hp frost slam. Off with the Skull Shaped Barbate and on with the Froglok King Crown. Off with the Orc Fang Necklace, and on with the White Gold Necklace. Goodbye Ry'Gorr Battlemail, hello Netherbian Chitin (used to be Dwarven Ringmail Tunic before Luclin hehe).

The proof will quickly become self evident. A close call against a light blue caster mob now becomes a joke.

Too F***ing bad we pallies can't wield this thing in our range slot.

/rude Verant
/rude Verant
/rude Verant
/rude Verant
/rude Verant

____________________________
Duke Ardnahoy
Noble Lord Protector of the 70th Crusade
Fennin Ro - EQ I

Ardnahoy II
Fearless Guardian of the 40th Tour
Mistmore - EQ II
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2001 at 5:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766241909
1 post
Hey dude, you checked out the resists, this little fork thingy is worth 1k, Im playin on VZ and magik resistance is important, the only "nOOB i see is this brainplay kid
▲ Page top
RE: this isn't worth it
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2001 at 8:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761525392
89 posts
Funny that you used "nOOb" as an insult, since the only one I see here is you, brainplay. No one gives a rat's *** about the 5dam, 29del and what a lousy ratio that is, since no one in their right mind buys it to use as a weapon anyway. It's a range slot item with +10 to 3 resists.

The above price is pretty accurate. You just aren't knowledgable enough yet to realize why. When you finally get high enough level to start going on Vox/Naggy raids (just to give an obvious example), you will understand the value of this item.


Edited, Fri Dec 28 08:48:05 2001
▲ Page top
Yeah it is
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 5:32 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591769951807
11 posts

I'm a warrior, and if someone said 'How would you like a range-slot item that gave you 10 to all your major resists?' I'd jump at the offer. 500 - 1k is worth those resists, especially when it's in the range slot.
▲ Page top
i have some usefull info
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2001 at 6:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361693083
11 posts
ok i'm a 40 wizard, and yes i waz pharming it (only to kill time) i waz in guk helpin a guildie kill mutant to do her quest. and after the kill i'd just run around all the PH's that weren't camped. well her comes the info on squire (wich i found out from a nice sk, and i just proved it to be right) when he spawns if he's holding a speer, he'll drop it (might be the fork, i've never seen it equiped) if you dont see him with it, u'll just get a necklace or the ussual frog drops.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 25 2001 at 4:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Paladins do not get piercing. They get 2 handed. That is all.
RE: mr. pally is wrong
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2002 at 3:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750090920
Scholar
41 posts
Pally's don't get only two handed piercing. There are also a limited amount of one handers that allow us to bash. Crystal Grinder is one example, allows you to train without losing the ability to stop those pesky casters.

QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 11:30 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Funny story, really....
Went to check out Lguk to see if magus was camped. On my way through Upper Guk via lower i passed the squire. I noticed he wasn't camped for a change so I wanted to see what the big deal was (why I see ppl camping him all the time) So I killed him.
I kill him, and guess what? He dropped the runed bone fork.
I didn't even know how amazing this thing was. Oh well... begginers luck I guess.
Just dont call me a n00b cause I'll kick you're *****
btw Magus was camped, too :(
